column3: Feed your champion at least one potion today
column8: Lowest-friction daily — guarantees one app-open per day. Feeds the bond/mood loop.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion + potions; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Server-tracks the first feed event per UTC day. Resets at 00:00 UTC.

column3: Win 1 arena battle today (vs bot or PvP)
column8: Drives daily Arena traffic. Win-only filter prevents queue-spam farming.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L3+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Tracked off the existing arena_battle_resolved event with winner=keeper.

column3: Complete 1 adventure quest today (any tier)
column8: Pulls keepers into the Quest hub every day. Any tier counts so even casual players hit it.
column9: Owns 1+ champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Reset at UTC midnight; first quest_complete event per day.

column3: Equip or swap any gear piece on a champion today
column8: Drives inventory engagement and gear awareness. Gentle nudge into the Stable.
column9: Owns 1+ gear NFT; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Tracked from equipment_change event. Prevents pure idle-feed playstyle.

column3: Gain +5 bond on any champion today
column8: Care actions stack — 5 bond is roughly one full care loop (feed + quest + arena win). Rewards real engagement, not single clicks.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L3+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Bond delta calculated server-side at UTC midnight rollover.

column3: Open the Stable view and view every champion you own today
column8: Light retention quest specifically for multi-champion keepers. Encourages the collection mindset.
column9: Owns 2+ champions; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Only triggers for keepers with 2+ champions. Tracked from champion_view events.

column3: Complete 1 Easy AND 1 Medium-or-Hard quest today
column8: Forces varied play — can't farm just easy quests. Pushes keepers to level up enough to attempt Hard.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L5+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Two-condition tracking: easy_quest_done AND (medium OR hard)_quest_done in the same UTC day.

column3: Log in and care for your champion 6 of 7 days (any potion-feed, quest-claim, or arena fight counts as a care action)
column8: Mirrors the proven Berserk Turning Up pattern — guaranteed weekly retention floor at low effort. Care actions cover all three core loops (feed/quest/arena) so any playstyle qualifies.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Anti-farm: each day requires at least one tracked event, server-side. Already tracked by the bond/mood system.

column3: Complete 5 in-game adventure quests this week (Easy/Medium/Hard tiers all count)
column8: Drives the Quest hub — the most differentiated mechanic in Champions. Quest progress also fills the Evolution Bar so this couples retention with progression.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Backend: count distinct quest_completions in the rolling 7-day window per wallet. Already tracked.

column3: Win 5 arena battles this week (vs bot or PvP)
column8: Drives Arena participation. Win-only filter prevents queue-spam farming. ELO-bracketed matches mean this scales with the keeper's level — fair across the curve.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion at L3+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Anti-farm: only PvP wins or wins vs bot in player's ELO bracket count. Bot dummy wins below bracket are ignored.

column3: Equip a full kit on any champion: weapon + at least 3 armor pieces (helm/cuirass/bracers/greaves/kilt/tunic)
column8: Pushes inventory + Agora purchases. Encourages the keeper to actually use the equipment system and learn what each species' weapon does.
column9: Owns weapon + 3 armor NFTs; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: One-time per week per wallet. Resets at week boundary.

column3: Evolve any champion through one stage gate this week (e.g. L1->L3, L3->L5)
column8: Rewards meaningful progression (not just feeding). Each evolution consumes an Evolution Potion so this also pulls inventory through the loop.
column9: Owns at least 1 evolution potion + a champion at gate; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Trivially trackable from the existing champion_evolve event.

column3: Complete 15 adventure quests this week (any tier)
column8: The mid-tier quest grinder target. 15 quests = ~2 per day average — sustained engagement without burnout.
column9: Owns 1+ champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts the same quest_completions as Adventure Apprentice but a higher bar. Both can stack in the same week.

column3: Complete 3 Hard-tier adventure quests this week
column8: Hard tier requires a leveled champion + investment. Anti-farm by definition because the time gate per Hard quest is real.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L10+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Filters quest_completed events by quest.tier == hard. Cooldown means max ~5 per week even for grinders.

column3: Maintain a 7-day daily-care streak this week
column8: Pure retention. Misses one day = streak resets. Pairs with the daily streak system already shipped.
column9: Owns 1+ champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Server-tracks the daily streak counter. Only awards when keeper hits 7 in the rolling week.

column3: Use 5 trait potions this week (any of STR/VIT/AGI/FER/INT/LCK)
column8: Drives the trait-potion economy — these are core consumables and most keepers under-use them.
column9: Owns 5+ trait potions in inventory; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts trait_potion_consumed events. Forces inventory rotation rather than hoarding.

column3: Gain +30 bond on any single champion this week
column8: Bond grows from feed/quest/arena/daily-claim. +30 = roughly 6 days of consistent care. Rewards picking a main.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L3+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Per-champion bond delta over the rolling 7-day window.

column3: Have 3+ champions with full kit (weapon + 3+ armor) at week's end
column8: Pushes Agora marketplace activity AND inventory. Hard because it requires owning 3 champions and the gear for all of them.
column9: Owns 3+ champions; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Snapshot taken at week boundary. No farming possible — it's a state check.

column3: Win 15 arena battles this week (vs bot or PvP)
column8: Mid-tier arena grinder quest above Initiate (5 wins) but below Apex (25 wins). Smooths the difficulty curve.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L5+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Same anti-farm rules as Arena Initiate — only ELO-bracketed wins count.

column3: Send 3 direct PvP invites this week (regardless of opponent accept)
column8: Pushes the Phase 8.6 direct-invite system. Invite-sent counts even if opponent ignores — keeps the social layer flowing.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L5+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Anti-spam: same opponent only counts once per week. Forces variety.

column3: Win 3 direct-invite PvP battles this week (1v1 challenges)
column8: Couples the direct-invite social layer with skill. Win-required filter means actual competitive PvP not collusion.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L7+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Same opponent only counts once per week. No self-invites.

column3: Field 3 different species in arena battles this week
column8: Encourages multi-champion ownership and species rotation. Light push toward The Pantheon one-off.
column9: Owns 3+ champions of different species; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts distinct species_id values across the keeper's arena_battle events in the rolling 7-day window.

column3: Win arena battles with 3 different bloodlines this week
column8: Deeper version of Species Mastery — 3 wins not 3 entries. Pushes the bloodline-as-loadout concept.
column9: Owns 3+ champions of different bloodlines; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts distinct bloodline_id values across the keeper's WIN events.

column3: Equip 5 different gear pieces from inventory this week
column8: Light inventory engagement. Distinct from Forge Mastery which is one full-kit assembly.
column9: Owns 5+ gear NFTs; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts distinct equipment_change events with new_item_id values.

column3: Evolve 2 different champions through stage gates this week
column8: Hardcore evolver target. Requires 2 evolution potions + 2 champions at gate. Top weekly chest count.
column9: Owns 2+ evolution potions + 2 champions at gate; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts distinct champion_evolve events with different champion_ids.

column3: Win 25 arena battles AND finish in the Top 100 weekly leaderboard
column8: The grinder/hardcore quest. Couples raw activity (25 wins) with skill (Top 100 ELO) so it can't be farmed by bot-spam.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion at L10+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Top 100 across all species/brackets, ranked by weekly delta ELO so newer players can compete with veterans by gaining ELO fast.

column3: Finish in Top 50 of the weekly leaderboard
column8: Higher-tier competitive quest above Apex Predator. The harshest weekly — only the top 50 ELO climbers in the world hit this.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L10+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Snapshot at week boundary. No retroactive — must be in Top 50 at the moment the week closes.

column3: Win 10 arena battles where you were the defender (incoming PvP attack)
column8: Rewards defensive loadouts and stable presence. Defender slot is currently underutilized — this drives it.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L7+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Filters battles by attacker != self_wallet AND winner == self_wallet.

column3: Win a Direct Invite PvP battle against another keeper (1v1 challenge)
column8: Pushes the Phase 8.6 direct-invite system. Social/competitive layer — adds keeper-vs-keeper rivalry.
column9: Both keepers have Active Frenzy Pass; invite accepted + battle resolved
column10: Anti-collusion: same opponent wallet only counts once per week. Forces keepers to challenge varied opponents.

column3: Feed at least one potion every day for 7 consecutive days
column8: Adds a daily-touch quest without exploding chest emission. Misses one day -> progress resets. Rewards real consistency.
column9: Owns at least 1 champion + potions inventory; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Backend already tracks the 7-day care signal for the daily streak system.

column3: Complete 1 Campaign chapter this week (any chapter)
column8: Drives the new Campaign mode into weekly cadence. Rewards keepers who pick up the solo PvE loop and progress through it.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L5+; Active Frenzy Pass; Campaign mode unlocked
column10: Counts campaign_chapter_complete events in the rolling 7-day window. Replays of completed chapters do NOT count.

column3: Finish at least one week in Top 10 of the weekly leaderboard during the month
column8: Apex monthly competitive quest. Anyone who hits Top 10 even once during a 4-week month qualifies — forgiving but still elite.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L10+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Snapshot taken weekly; if any of the 4 snapshots shows the keeper in Top 10, the monthly quest fires.

column3: Maintain a 28-day daily-care streak across the month
column8: Apex retention monthly. The hardest possible single-stat retention quest — one missed day kills it.
column9: Owns 1+ champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Server-tracks the daily streak counter. Awards on the day the streak hits 28.

column3: Win 100 arena battles in the month
column8: Mirrors Berserk's Call Me Champion at 4x scale for monthly cadence. Genuine grinder target.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L7+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Counts arena wins in the rolling 28-day window; same anti-farm as weeklies.

column3: Reach Soulbound (100 bond) on 3 different champions this month
column8: Endgame engagement monthly. Requires 3 mains all maxed in the same window — the deepest possible care commitment.
column9: Owns 3+ champions; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Snapshot at month boundary; counts distinct champion_ids with bond_score == 100.

column3: Adopt your first champion (any species/bloodline)
column8: Anchor moment — every player gets a chest immediately upon picking up the game. The early win Vulcan Poker uses with First Blood.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Fires on first champion_create event per wallet.

column3: Win your very first arena battle
column8: Onboarding milestone after First Hatch. Early-win moment that hooks new keepers into the Arena loop.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L3+; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Fires on first arena_battle_resolved with winner == self_wallet per wallet.

column3: Complete your very first adventure quest
column8: Onboarding chest for the Quest hub. Triggers immediately after the first quest_complete event.
column9: Owns 1+ champion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: One-time fire per wallet on first quest_complete.

column3: Evolve any champion through their first stage gate
column8: Onboarding chest for the evolution loop — most keepers don't realize evolution is the core progression hook until they hit it once.
column9: Owns 1+ champion + 1 evolution potion; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: Fires on first champion_evolve event per wallet.

column3: Reach Companion bond (50+) on any champion
column8: Pulls the bond/mood system into the reward loop. Bond grows from feeding, questing, arena wins, daily claims — players who do all the loops naturally hit 50.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass; champion owned ~2-3 weeks of regular play
column10: Server-side bond tracking already shipped. Awards once per wallet (any champion qualifies).

column3: Equip a full kit on any champion: weapon + ALL 6 armor slots (helm/cuirass/bracers/greaves/kilt/tunic)
column8: Mastery of the equipment system — every slot filled. Distinct from Forge Mastery (which is weapon + 3) by requiring the full set.
column9: Owns weapon + all 6 armor slot NFTs; Active Frenzy Pass
column10: One-time per wallet. Snapshot — must hold all 7 pieces equipped on the same champion at once.

column3: Own a champion of all 3 bloodlines for a single species
column8: Rewards collectors. Each species has 3 bloodlines (e.g. orc -> ironfang/bloodfang/ashclan); owning the full set = mastery of one species. Pushes Agora trades.
column9: Owns 3 distinct bloodlines of the same species_id
column10: Per species — keeper picks which species to complete. Once awarded, can't re-earn for the same species.

column3: Own at least one champion from each of the 8 species (orc, elf, goblin, demon, drakkin, dwarf, beastkin, wraith)
column8: The gotta catch 'em all quest. Drives Agora marketplace activity and species exploration.
column9: Owns 8 distinct species_id champions
column10: Likely takes a long time + meaningful spend; that's the point. Big chest reward justifies the effort.

column3: Reach stage 18 (Ascendant) — the second-highest evolution tier — on any champion
column8: Mid-game peak milestone. Hitting Ascendant means the player has invested ~weeks of feeding + questing + evolution.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass; champion stage_idx >= 17
column10: Awards once per wallet. Stage 18 is hard but doable in 2-3 weeks of consistent play.

column3: Reach 100 bond (Soulbound tier) on any single champion
column8: Endgame bond milestone. 100 bond requires sustained care across all loops over weeks. Rewards roleplay/story-driven players, not just grinders.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass; champion bond_score == 100
column10: Awards once per wallet (any champion). Bond is per-champion so players choose their main.

column3: Reach stage 20 (Legendary) — peak form — on any champion
column8: The endgame trophy. By design the rarest one-off — 3 chests is a payoff worth chasing. Also feeds the evolve beyond limits trailer narrative.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass; champion stage_idx == 19
column10: Awards once per wallet (first time any of the keeper's champions reaches L50/Legendary).

column3: Be among the first 10 wallets to reach stage 20 with any non-Ironfang bloodline
column8: Global race milestone — only awards to the first 10 wallets per bloodline. Drives launch competition and bragging rights.
column9: Active Frenzy Pass; champion stage_idx == 19; non-Ironfang bloodline
column10: Server checks global ranked count of stage_20 reaches per bloodline_id at the moment of evolve. Closes after 10 awards per bloodline.

column3: Complete Campaign Chapter 1 — defeat Skarn the Whelp-Eater
column8: Onboarding boss for Campaign mode. Tuned for stage 5+ champions so it's reachable for newer keepers.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L5+; Active Frenzy Pass; Campaign unlocked
column10: Fires on first campaign_chapter_complete event for chapter_id == 1.

column3: Complete Campaign Chapter 2 — defeat Vexora the Bone Empress
column8: Mid-game Campaign milestone. Vexora's stat scaling matches a stage 8 champion in full kit.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L8+; Active Frenzy Pass; Chapter 1 cleared
column10: Fires on first campaign_chapter_complete event for chapter_id == 2.

column3: Complete Campaign Chapter 3 — defeat Thornwarden Mossback
column8: Curse-themed mid-late chapter. Thornwarden has high VIT and DOT mechanics — encourages varied builds.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L11+; Active Frenzy Pass; Chapter 2 cleared
column10: Fires on first campaign_chapter_complete event for chapter_id == 3.

column3: Complete Campaign Chapter 4 — defeat Inferno-King Pyrrhos
column8: Penultimate boss. Pyrrhos is a stage 15-equivalent with twin-blade burst damage — counters glass-cannon builds.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L15+; Active Frenzy Pass; Chapter 3 cleared
column10: Fires on first campaign_chapter_complete event for chapter_id == 4.

column3: Complete Campaign Chapter 5 — defeat Voidlord Aetheron
column8: Final Campaign boss + endgame trophy. Voidlord Aetheron is stage 18-equivalent with multi-affinity moveset. Awards a cosmetic Apex Champion title in addition to chests.
column9: Owns 1+ champion at L18+; Active Frenzy Pass; Chapter 4 cleared
column10: Fires on first campaign_chapter_complete event for chapter_id == 5. Awards cosmetic title that displays on champion card.
